title: GoetyIron
description: This addon adds Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mobs as Goety servants, allowing you to command powerful magical beings from another realm.
body:
This mod turns some creatures from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks into servants for the goety mod. Currently added include: Pyromancer Servant, Cryomancer Servant, Cleric Servant, Archevoker Servant, Necromancer Servant, Ancient Knight Servant, Dead King Servant, and Alchemist Servant. These servants are either summoned through focus summoning or transformed and summoned via rituals.You can also have your Spellcaster Servants learn additional spells or empower them with upgrade orbs! You can use this mod directly in any modpack or server.

本模组将一些来自Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks的生物制作成了goety模组的仆从，目前添加了：炽焰术士仆从、冰霜术士仆从、牧师仆从、高位唤魔者仆从、亡灵术士仆从、远古骑士仆从、死者之王仆从、药剂师仆从。这些仆从或是由聚晶召唤而来，或是由仪式转化和召唤而来。你还可以让术士仆从学习更多法术，或是用升级法球强化他们！ 你可以在整合包或服务器中直接使用本模组。
